texto: I also saw that theologically speaking the whole idea of a smacking is not congruent with the teaching revealed in the gospel of Jesus Christ. God sent His Son into the world to save the world so they would not have to suffer for their own sins, but parents today punish their children and make them undergo the horrors of punishment for even the most minor of infractions. The idea of mercy is seemingly not applied at all. When parents' sin, they ask God to forgive them, repent and know they are forgiven. When children sin, they are judged, tried, condemned and punished.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Samuel Martin sobre temas ligados a educacao. A afirmação “I also saw that theologically speaking the whole idea of a smacking is not congruent with the tea…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, bible, biblical-parenting, útil em momentos de biblical-parenting e children.
